steps.title: Find the scale factor
steps.content: For similar solids, the volume ratio is the cube of the linear scale factor. The table gives a volume ratio of $27$, so the scale factor from cylinder A to cylinder B is $3$.

steps.title: Find each cylinder size
steps.content: Cylinder A has radius $7$ and height $8$. Cylinder B has radius $21$ and height $24$.

steps.title: Subtract the coefficients
steps.content:
Use the surface area formula for each cylinder.
$$\text{SA}_A=2\pi(7)^2+2\pi(7)(8)=210\pi$$
$$\text{SA}_B=2\pi(21)^2+2\pi(21)(24)=1{,}890\pi$$
$$n-k=1{,}890-210=1{,}680$$
So $n-k$ is 1680. The answer is 1,680.
